creator: lofi@FreeBSD.org
text:
mDNSResponder and libthai are small leaf dependencies which provide important 
features to kdelibs to those who need them and which cannot be added by a 
binary plugin later. We deem the small overhead (2 mb source code for 
mDNSResponder and libthai combined or 1 mb for the mDNSResponder + libthai 
binary packages combined) acceptable for everyone and not worth adding 
additional complexity to the port.

-- 
   ,_,   | Michael Nottebrock               | lofi@freebsd.org
 (/^ ^\) | FreeBSD - The Power to Serve     | http://www.freebsd.org
   \u/   | K Desktop Environment on FreeBSD | http://freebsd.kde.org
